global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and promotional text on a vibrant background.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with a clear offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid color background occupying the top portion of the ad, providing a clean and simple backdrop.

elements.label: Center graphic area
elements.description: An abstract graphic area in the center, featuring geometric shapes that suggest a modern and digital theme.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold, black text in the bottom section that communicates the main offer, with a clear and readable font style.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Fast signup, instant card -30% Learn more

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top left, featuring the name 'CoinBridge' in a stylized font against a contrasting background.
